levels.label: Severely Dry
levels.action: Irrigate immediately at high volume. Soil is critically dry.

levels.label: Dry
levels.action: Irrigate soon. Moisture levels are below optimal.

levels.label: Below Optimal
levels.action: Light irrigation recommended to reach optimal range.

levels.label: Optimal
levels.action: Moisture levels are ideal. No action needed.

levels.label: High
levels.action: Reduce irrigation. Soil is moist enough.

levels.label: Waterlogged
levels.action: Stop irrigation immediately. Improve drainage.

levels.label: Freezing
levels.action: Critical frost conditions. Use frost protection covers.

levels.label: Cold
levels.action: Soil is too cold for optimal growth. Consider mulching.

levels.label: Cool
levels.action: Temperature is below optimal. Growth may be slowed.

levels.label: Optimal
levels.action: Temperature is ideal for crop growth.

levels.label: Warm
levels.action: Temperature is above optimal. Ensure adequate irrigation.

levels.label: Hot
levels.action: Heat stress risk. Increase irrigation and provide shade.

levels.label: Extreme Heat
levels.action: Dangerous temperatures. Emergency cooling measures needed.

levels.label: Very Acidic
levels.action: Apply agricultural lime (CaCO₃) to raise pH. Urgent.

levels.label: Acidic
levels.action: Apply dolomitic lime to gradually raise pH.

levels.label: Slightly Acidic
levels.action: Monitor pH. Light liming may be beneficial.

levels.label: Optimal
levels.action: pH is ideal for most crops. No action needed.

levels.label: Slightly Alkaline
levels.action: Monitor pH. Consider sulfur application if trend continues.

levels.label: Alkaline
levels.action: Apply elemental sulfur or ammonium-based fertilizers.

levels.label: Very Alkaline
levels.action: Urgent pH correction needed. Apply sulfur and organic matter.

levels.label: Very Low
levels.action: Very low nutrient content. Apply balanced fertilizer.

levels.label: Low
levels.action: Nutrient levels are low. Consider light fertilization.

levels.label: Optimal
levels.action: Nutrient levels are well balanced.

levels.label: Elevated
levels.action: Nutrient levels are high. Reduce fertilization.

levels.label: High
levels.action: Salinity risk. Leach soil with clean water.

levels.label: Very High
levels.action: Severe salinity. Stop fertilization, leach soil immediately.

levels.label: Very Low
levels.action: Severe nitrogen deficiency. Apply urea or ammonium nitrate urgently.

levels.label: Low
levels.action: Nitrogen deficiency. Apply nitrogen-rich fertilizer.

levels.label: Below Optimal
levels.action: Light nitrogen supplementation recommended.

levels.label: Optimal
levels.action: Nitrogen levels are ideal for growth.

levels.label: Elevated
levels.action: Nitrogen is high. Reduce or skip next fertilization.

levels.label: Excessive
levels.action: Nitrogen excess. Stop fertilization. Leaching recommended.

levels.label: Very Low
levels.action: Severe phosphorus deficiency. Apply superphosphate or rock phosphate.

levels.label: Low
levels.action: Phosphorus deficiency. Apply phosphate fertilizer.

levels.label: Below Optimal
levels.action: Light phosphorus supplementation recommended.

levels.label: Optimal
levels.action: Phosphorus levels are ideal for root development.

levels.label: Elevated
levels.action: Phosphorus is high. Reduce phosphate application.

levels.label: Excessive
levels.action: Phosphorus excess. Stop phosphate fertilizers.

levels.label: Very Low
levels.action: Severe potassium deficiency. Apply potash (KCl) urgently.

levels.label: Low
levels.action: Potassium deficiency. Apply potassium-rich fertilizer.

levels.label: Below Optimal
levels.action: Light potassium supplementation recommended.

levels.label: Optimal
levels.action: Potassium levels are ideal for fruit development.

levels.label: Elevated
levels.action: Potassium is high. Reduce potassium application.

levels.label: Excessive
levels.action: Potassium excess. Stop potassium fertilizers.

summary_templates.all_good: All parameters are within optimal ranges for {landName}. No corrective action required.
summary_templates.some_issues: {landName} shows some parameters outside optimal range. Review the recommendations below.
summary_templates.critical_action: Immediate action required for {landName}. {criticalCount} parameter(s) at critical levels.
